name: Balloon factory
description:
The factory of the famous furry balloons was a great success in the 2000s. The factory shut down because of a huge accident causing half the workers dieing in it. The place was lock down and not for sale as for a graveyard for the died workers yet there is another reason why they closed the factory and locked it away from everyone. But you came to find out why and for the truth or maybe more than that's there's more to the factory than everyone knows?

Art come from
creator: Acedragofluff
